description_long: This is a luxury wristwatch featuring a rose gold-toned metal case with a dark, likely black, dial. The dial is detailed with three subdials, baton hour markers, and a date window, suggesting a chronograph design. The watch strap is textured and appears to be made of light gray leather with visible stitching and a classic buckle closure. The side of the case includes two pushers and a crown, all matching the rose gold finish. The back of the strap and the inner lining are a tan suede or leather material, providing comfort and contrast. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for both formal and urban casual settings.
description: A rose gold chronograph wristwatch with a black dial, gray textured leather strap, and classic buckle closure. Features include subdials, a date window, and a luxurious, modern aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial with rose gold markers, subdials, and the brand logo, along with the upper part of the gray leather strap.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the rose gold case, the crown, and pushers, as well as the curvature and texture of the gray strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the gray leather strap, the buckle, and the back of the watch case.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case's depth, the strap's attachment, and the tan inner lining of the strap.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, gold-colored text logo is present on the upper center of the dial, reading 'ARMOLEA'.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with rose gold baton hour markers, three subdials arranged in a classic chronograph layout, and a date window at the 4 o'clock position. The design is detailed and functional, with a modern chronograph style and no numerals.
attribute_strap_type: Textured gray leather strap with visible stitching and a classic buckle, featuring a tan inner lining.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, and a date window. No luminous elements are visible.
